issues.title: SSL certificate expiring in 5 days on production API gateway
issues.description: The wildcard cert for *.api.taskpilot.io expires 2026-06-26. Auto-renewal via Certbot broke silently after the DNS provider migration last month. Manual renewal required plus root-cause fix on Certbot config. If it lapses, all API clients get TLS handshake errors.
issues.business_impact: All 14 enterprise API clients will receive TLS errors if cert expires.

issues.title: Memory leak in WebSocket service causing OOM restarts every 4-6 hours
issues.description: ws-gateway restarts every 4-6 hours due to OOM kills. Heap profiling shows unbounded growth in the event-listener map — listeners registered on connect but never removed on disconnect. Process reaches 2.8 GB before kubelet kills it. All active sessions drop on every restart.
issues.business_impact: 3,200 concurrent users lose real-time updates on every restart.

issues.title: GDPR erasure backlog — 47 deletion requests exceeding 30-day SLA
issues.description: GDPR Art. 17 requires processing within 30 days. Backlog has 47 overdue requests, oldest at 58 days. The automated deletion pipeline broke after the DB schema migration on 2026-05-28 — a hard-coded table reference was not updated. Legal has flagged this.
issues.business_impact: Regulatory fine risk up to 4% annual revenue. Legal team on notice.

issues.title: POST /api/v1/export missing rate limiting — security scan finding
issues.description: Security scan found /api/v1/export has no rate limiting. A single API key can trigger unlimited parallel exports, causing both credit leakage and potential DoS on report workers. All other endpoints already use the rate-limiter middleware — this one was missed in the Q2 refactor.
issues.business_impact: Abuse vector for export credits. DoS risk on report workers.

issues.title: Upgrade Node.js 18 to 20 LTS — runtime is past EOL
issues.description: Node.js 18 reached EOL April 2025. We run 18.20.4 on ws-gateway, api-server and webhook-dispatcher. Node 20 LTS is available and passes CI. Requires Docker base image updates and native module compatibility check (bcrypt, sharp). ws-gateway tests need minor updates for the changed crypto API.
issues.business_impact: No security patches on EOL runtime. Vulnerability exposure grows weekly.

issues.title: PostgreSQL connection pool exhausted under 500 concurrent users
issues.description: Load test at 500 concurrent users exhausts the 25-connection pool in 8 seconds. Subsequent requests queue then timeout (504). PR #342 adds pgBouncer connection multiplexing — needs review. Alternative: read replica or pool increase, but pgBouncer is the right long-term fix.
issues.business_impact: API latency spikes 400-1200 ms at peak hours.

issues.title: Wire OpenTelemetry tracing into task-worker and notification-service
issues.description: OTel SDK is installed but only initialised in api-server. Cross-service request tracing is impossible. Span propagation needs wiring into task-worker and notification-service. Jaeger already runs in staging. Without this, debugging inter-service latency requires manual log correlation.
issues.business_impact: Production latency investigations take 2-3x longer without traces.

issues.title: Refactor auth to OAuth 2.1 with PKCE support
issues.description: Current auth uses OAuth 2.0 implicit flow, deprecated in 2.1. Three enterprise prospects require PKCE to pass their internal security audits. Architecture doc in Notion needs sign-off before implementation. Estimated 5 sprints.
issues.business_impact: 3 enterprise deals blocked pending PKCE support.

issues.title: React hydration mismatch errors on SSR dashboard pages
issues.description: Dashboard and task-list pages throw React hydration errors in production (~800/hour in Sentry). Root cause: date-formatting library returns locale-dependent output server vs client. Affects first paint and inflates LCP by ~180 ms.
issues.business_impact: 800 Sentry errors/hour. LCP regression of ~180 ms on dashboard.

issues.title: Payment module test coverage at 42% — needs 80% before next billing release
issues.description: The Stripe integration, invoice generation and proration logic sits at 42% coverage. Last three billing bugs were in untested paths. Edge cases like failed 3DS auth and mid-charge network timeout have never been exercised in tests.
issues.business_impact: Low coverage in billing code risks silent revenue loss from bugs.

issues.title: Remove deprecated /api/v1 endpoints — v2 fully live since Q1
issues.description: API v2 live since January. < 0.3% of requests still hit v1 (internal scripts only). v1 codebase adds 2,400 lines and two vulnerable dependencies that cannot be updated without breaking v1 contracts.
issues.business_impact: Two vulnerable deps locked behind v1 shims.

issues.title: Consolidate three overlapping feature-flag systems
issues.description: Three coexisting flag systems: LaunchDarkly (billing), in-house Redis flags (platform), hardcoded env vars (legacy). Flags can silently conflict. Proposal: standardise on LaunchDarkly. Migration plan exists — needs stakeholder sign-off.
issues.business_impact: Flag conflicts cause silent rollout failures.
